title: rosa × dumetorum subvar. imitata
intro: Rosa × dumetorum subvar. imitata, also known as the 'Rosa Rugosa' or 'Japanese Rose', is a subvariety of the Rosa × dumetorum species, characterized by its fragrant, pink flowers and leathery leaves. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Rosa × dumetorum subvar. imitata include its ability to soothe skin irritations, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. Rosa × dumetorum subvar. imitata is typically prepared as an herbal tea or infused oil, which can be used topically or taken internally to harness its medicinal properties.
